transactions.description: 3B Noah Mendlinger assigned to Springfield Cardinals from Memphis Redbirds.
Chicago Cubs activated RHP Eli Morgan from the 60-day injured list.
Athletics placed 2B Zack Gelof on the 10-day injured list. Left shoulder dislocation.
Chicago Cubs optioned RHP Eli Morgan to Iowa Cubs.
